name: Black Clover Rpg  Remake.
description:
this bot is an mass over hole an a previous bot I had made.

in this bot you are in the world of Black clover. there are different location you can start at such as in the clover kingdom the stander starting position, or in one of the other kingdoms and witch Forest.

In this scenario you also get to pick a point in the time line to start in from Magic Knights Entrance Arc, to the Spade Kingdom Raid Arc.

The list of Location are the

Clover Kingdom, The Heart kingdom, The diamond Kingdom, the spade kingdom, and The Witches' Forest hard mode for men.

List of time line location.

Magic Knights Entrance Arc

Royal Capital Assault Arc

Witches' Forest Arc

Royal Knights Arc

Elf Reincarnation Arc

Heart Kingdom Joint Struggle Arc

Spade Kingdom Raid Arc
